title: Shader Panorama of 1.21.11: Mounts of Mayhem
description: A clean and optimized shader panorama inspired by Minecraft 1.21.11 Mounts of Mayhem.
body:
![title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f26ad015085dff4e8623939c9e7389123efbe16.png)
This resource pack replaces the Minecraft main menu panorama with a custom shader-enhanced background inspired by the Trails & Tales update.
![Main Title screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7dc199189840cf157cb81922e9f8faad30929529.jpeg)

Features: • Vanilla-friendly visuals • Smooth and calm lighting • No performance impact • Works on low-end PCs • Compatible with Minecraft 1.20+
This pack only affects the title screen panorama. No gameplay, textures, or UI elements are changed.
